description: Drag a food item onto the selected pet to feed that pet.
feedbackText: Fresh food is set out in the habitat.

description: Drag a water item onto the selected pet to refill thirst.
feedbackText: Clean water is refreshed for the group.

effectSummary: Recalls the pets home and restores energy.
description: Send the selected pet to its rest spot so energy can recover.
feedbackText: Everyone is encouraged back home to rest.

description: Drag a toy or play item onto the selected pet to start play.
feedbackText: The pets perk up and play around the habitat.

description: Drag a grooming item onto the selected pet to improve grooming.
feedbackText: A gentle grooming pass settles the group.

description: Drag a bath item onto the selected pet to clean it more deeply.
feedbackText: Bath time leaves the pets cleaner and calmer.

effectSummary: Helps pets recover when they feel unwell.
description: Drag medicine onto the selected pet when it needs treatment.
Use a doctor-care item on the selected pet for stronger recovery.
feedbackText: A closer health check is given to the pets.

effectSummary: Recalls the pets to their home environment.
description: Call the selected pet back to its assigned home spot.
feedbackText: The pets are called back into the habitat.
